message:
feat(engine): add deterministic bytecode VM and tier-up profiler for RGC-601

Introduce two new dependency-safe modules forming the substrate for RGC-601
tiered execution:

- bytecode_vm.rs: deterministic bytecode VM with Register, ObjectId, Value,
  Instruction, Program, and BytecodeVm types. Supports inline-cache-backed
  property access for reproducible execution across architectures.
- tier_up_profiler.rs: deterministic hot-path profiling that consumes
  bytecode_vm::ExecutionReport traces to derive replay-stable hotspot
  profiles and tier-up eligibility decisions. Configurable TierUpPolicy
  with thresholds for min steps, invocations, cache hit rate, etc.
- Tests: VM tests (load constants, arithmetic, object creation, inline
  cache property access), profiler tests (hot-loop programs, profile
  building, tier-up eligibility evaluation)
- Wire both modules into lib.rs module tree

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
